function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_29__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-29 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It is attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; must verify written content via read (no overwrite) and then finish by deleting processed inbox item per workflow.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox file content is correct: attachment path was read earlier, recipient matches canonical entity email, single attachment ordering is trivially newest-first, and YAML subject quoting is valid. Next complete workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Read back outbound file and confirmed it contains the expected draft email to nina@finance-workflow.example with the requested invoice attachment.

next_step.current_state: Task fully completed: next inbox item processed, outbound draft created, and inbox file deleted per workflow.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after successfully completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by verifying sender identity, locating the requested invoice, creating an outbound email draft with the invoice attached, and removing the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS.MD files for entered folders, used inbox/email/outbound workflows, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md asked for the 2025-12-29 Nordstern invoice. Canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/nina.md matched sender nina@finance-workflow.example, and canonical invoice record 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_29__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md matched the requested date/vendor. Outbound draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with exact attachment path, then the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
